channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Alexa Ilacad Gets Sweaty and Laughs Hard During Fun Game Segment on It's Showtime
item.description: In a recent episode of the popular noontime show It's Showtime, actress Alexa Ilacad joined the lively Laro Laro Pick game segment that had everyone in stitches. While playing the energetic game with ...

item.title: 27-year-old IT employee arrested in Kochi for stalking and sexually harassing a Malayalam actor
item.description: In a recent incident in Kochi, Kerala, the Palarivattom police have arrested a 27-year-old man named Jithin Roy, who works as an IT employee in the city and resides in Palarivattom area. The arrest wa...

item.title: Ushuru Sacco reduces KUSCCO investment amid rising sector risks
item.description: Ushuru Savings and Credit Co-operative Society, commonly known as Ushuru Sacco, has written off Sh5 million linked to Kenya Union of Savings and Credit Co-operatives (KUSCCO) following investment conc...

item.title: Saskatoon Police Introduce Taffy, a Specially Trained Dog to Detect Hidden Electronic Devices in Child Exploitation Investigations
item.description: The Saskatoon Police Service (SPS) has welcomed a golden retriever named Taffy to its Internet Child Exploitation (ICE) unit. Taffy, a nearly three-year-old female dog, is specially trained to locate ...

item.title: Criminal Takeover of Nigeria's Forest Reserves and Game Parks
item.description: Nigeria forests and game reserves wey suppose be money makers don turn to safe havens for terrorists, bandits and armed robbers. Places like Sambisa Forest for Borno, wey Boko Haram and ISWAP dey cont...

item.title: UK Army Chief Responds to Family of Kenyan Woman Murdered by Soldier
item.description: The article details the ongoing situation surrounding the murder of Agnes Wanjiru in Kenya in 2012, for which a former British soldier, Robert Purkiss, is now charged. It highlights the long wait – th...

item.title: BUA Cement, Lafarge Africa and Nestlé Nigeria Cross N1 Trillion Revenue Mark in 2025 Amid Economic Recovery
item.description: For 2025, several big Nigerian companies don enter the trillion-naira revenue club as economic conditions improve small small. BUA Cement revenue jump to N1.18 trillion from N876 billion the previous ...

item.title: Elon Musk Held Liable for Fraud in $44 Billion Twitter Deal
item.description: A U.S. federal jury has found Elon Musk guilty of defrauding Twitter shareholders over his $44 billion takeover of the company in 2022. Musk was accused of attempting to manipulate Twitter’s stock pri...

item.title: Warriors defeat Knights 30-12 in Round 3 NRL clash at McDonald Jones Stadium
item.description: In Round 3 of the 2026 NRL Premiership, the New Zealand Warriors secured a solid victory over the Newcastle Knights with a final score of 30-12 at McDonald Jones Stadium in Newcastle. The match, part ...

item.title: World Athletics Indoor Championships 2026: full timetable and Team GB medal prospects in Toruń
item.description: The World Athletics Indoor Championships 2026 are taking place in Toruń, Poland, over three days from 20 to 22 March, providing a major international athletics competition in a year without Olympic or...

item.title: Ama Qamata Stars as DRC-born Boxer Safi in New Film, Talks Premier in Congo
item.description: Ama Qamata, widely known for her roles in *Gomora* and *Blood & Water*, steps into the world of international cinema with her latest film, *Fight Like a Girl*. Premiering in the Democratic Republic of...

item.title: Saskatoon woman launches support group for functional neurological disorder after personal diagnosis
item.description: In Saskatoon, Saskatchewan, Kim Lameront has founded a new organization called Healing Horizons to provide resources and coping strategies for individuals living with functional neurological disorder ...

item.title: Malaysian national caught with ₱102-M worth of illegal drugs at NAIA
item.description: A Malaysian woman was arrested at the Ninoy Aquino International Airport Terminal 1 (NAIA-1) after authorities discovered more than 15 kilograms of suspected shabu (methamphetamine hydrochloride) in h...

item.title: Rain and Thunderstorms Hit Karachi on Eid ul Fitr, Bringing Pleasant Weather and Relief from Heat
item.description: On the first day of Eid ul Fitr, Karachi experienced intermittent to heavy rainfall accompanied by thunder, lightning, and strong winds, making the weather pleasant and reducing the heat intensity. Ar...

item.title: Teacher in Murang’a Helps a Boy Get New Uniform After Struggling with Torn Clothes
item.description: A Grade Two pupil from a public school in Gatanga, Murang’a County, has been attending classes in torn shorts tied together by a leso, determined to continue learning despite the discomfort and embarr...

item.title: Mamata Banerjee criticises BJP over voter roll exercise and rights concerns during Eid event in Kolkata
item.description: West Bengal Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee, while addressing an Eid-ul-Fitr gathering in Kolkata, strongly criticised the BJP and the central government over what she described as attempts to undermin...

item.title: Ongoing Middle East Tensions Amid US-Iran Conflict and Regional Attacks
item.description: As of March 21, 2026, tensions in the Middle East continue to escalate, particularly involving the US, Israel, and Iran. Recent reports indicate a targeted attack near the South Pars gas field in Bush...

item.title: US Jury Finds Elon Musk Misled Investors Ahead of Twitter Acquisition
item.description: A U.S. jury has determined that Elon Musk misled investors by intentionally driving down Twitter's stock price in the months leading up to his $44 billion acquisition of the social media company, late...

item.title: 89-year-old woman dies after vehicle crashes into Labrador home on Gold Coast
item.description: An 89-year-old woman has died following a serious crash in the Gold Coast suburb of Labrador, where a vehicle collided with a residential property. The incident occurred at approximately 3:40pm on Fri...

item.title: Restoring Kenya's forests for long-term economic and ecological benefits
item.description: The article explains how Kenya's forests are not only important for nature but also for the economy. It shows that when forests are destroyed or degraded, the country loses money through lost water ca...
